---
title: "Outreach"
toc: true
---

## Public Lectures

### The Turbulent Interstellar Medium  
**Public lecture**, Observatoire de Paris — 2024  

📄 [Slides (PDF)](files/outreach/turbulent_ism_2024.pdf)

Short description of the talk if you wish (optional).  
For example: an introduction to the physics of the interstellar medium and how turbulence shapes star-forming clouds.
